hooks.command: [ -f todos/todos.db ] && n=$(node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/todos.mjs" count open 2>/dev/null); [ "${n:-0}" != "0" ] && echo "master-brain: ${n} open todo(s) — run /mb:todos-list to review or /mb:todos-execute to work them." || true

echo "master-brain · humanizer rule: before delivering any prose you produce (marketing copy, reports, emails, blog drafts, deliverables), pass it through the humanizer skill's patterns (mb:humanizer / /humanizer) so it reads human-written, not AI-generated. Skip only for code, raw data, or when the user asks for verbatim output."
